name: resolve_target_project_and_service_map
steps: bin/aihelper exports AIHELPER_TARGET_ROOT from current working directory
context_engine/main.py parses analyze command and project-root overrides
context_engine/common.py project_root resolves the active target repository
context_engine/common.py discover_services scans root and child services for ai/index/features.json
context_engine/common.py load_feature_index/load_flow_index/load_integration_index normalize index shape

name: analyze_known_feature_request
steps: context_engine/intent_detector.py detect_intent
context_engine/detect_feature.py detect_features
context_engine/detect_feature.py detect_feature_matches
context_engine/load_context.py load_context_bundle
context_engine/build_prompt.py rewrite_prompt
context_engine/build_prompt.py build_prompt
context_engine/planner.py build_execution_plan
context_engine/main.py returns JSON result

name: discover_unknown_feature_with_ollama
steps: context_engine/discovery.py discover_feature_from_codebase builds a local snapshot
context_engine/ollama_fallback.py build_discovery_prompt creates strict JSON instructions
context_engine/ollama_fallback.py generate_with_ollama resolves an available local model and calls /api/generate
context_engine/main.py parses the Ollama JSON response
context_engine/main.py returns discovery_result in discover_feature execution step

name: handoff_unknown_feature_to_external_llm
entry_point: context_engine/main.py prompt_only path when Ollama is unavailable
steps: context_engine/discovery.py discover_feature_from_codebase builds a compact snapshot
context_engine/ollama_fallback.py build_manual_fallback_prompt creates a short GPT or Claude handoff prompt
context_engine/main.py prints the compact prompt to console instead of failing

name: update_ai_knowledge_base_from_discovery
steps: context_engine/main.py receives a parsed discovery_result
context_engine/kb_updater.py validates confidence and existence rules
context_engine/kb_updater.py writes ai/features/<feature>.json if it does not exist
context_engine/kb_updater.py writes ai/flows/<flow>.json for discovered flows
context_engine/kb_updater.py updates ai/index/features.json and ai/index/flows.json

name: record_feedback_and_keyword_learning
steps: context_engine/main.py feedback command parses corrected intent and features
context_engine/learning.py record_feedback updates per-intent and per-feature token weights
context_engine/learning.py writes learned_keywords.json and feedback_log.json
context_engine/intent_detector.py and context_engine/detect_feature.py read those learned weights on future runs
